rationale.R1.6: The revised version improves writing polish by removing redundancy and excess hedging.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is partially addressed, but the revised text still uses some hedges (e.g., 'reasonable accuracy', 'modestly better').
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is mostly within scope with one drift (the generalization paragraph could be shortened).
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is not directly addressed, but the revised text does not introduce new errors or fabrications.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are partially addressed, as the revised text specifies the statistic used (likelihood-ratio-style), but could be improved by providing more details.
